resumeText:
corescent
[Company Logo]
[Company Name]
[Address]
[City, State, ZIP]
[Date]
Prathmesh
[Address]
[City, State, ZIP]
Dear Prathmesh,
We are pleased to offer you the position of [Position] at [Company Name], as
discussed during your interview on [Interview Date]. We believe your skills
and experience make you an ideal fit for our team, and we are excited about
the prospect of having you on board.
Below are the details of the offer:
* Job Title: [Position]
* Department: [Department]
* Reporting Manager: [Reporting Manager's Name]

                                                                          T
* Date of Joining: [Date of Joining]

                                                                        N
* Salary: [Salary] per annum, payable in [number] installments per month

                                                                      E
* Benefits:

                                                        C
+ Medical Insurance: [Details of medical insurance]
+ Leave Policy: [Details of leave policy]
+ Other benefits: [Details of other benefits]

                                        R           E S
                                      O
You will be entitled to all benefits and privileges as per the company's

                                C
policies, which will be shared with you during the onboarding process. You
will also be subject to the company's rules, regulations, and code of
conduct.
 To confirm your acceptance of this offer, please sign and return one copy of
this letter to us by [Deadline]. We also require a copy of your identification
proof and address proof for our records.
If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to
us. We look forward to welcoming you to our team.
Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Your Designation]
[Company Name]
Acceptance:
I, Prathmesh, accept the offer of employment with [Company Name] as
outlined above. I understand that this offer is contingent upon my ability to
provide documentation of my eligibility to work in [Country/State]. I confirm
that the information provided by me during the hiring process is true and
accurate.
Signature: ________________________________
Date: ___________________________________
Please return a signed copy of this letter to [Company Name] by [Deadline]
to confirm your acceptance of this offer.

headline: AI Engineer

resumeText:
Yashvardhan Sharma                    Indore, India +91 95897 08682
                [yashvardhansharma111@gmail.com](mailto:yashvardhansharma111@gmail.com)
                   github.com/yashvardhansharma111 linkedin.com/in/yashvardhan-sharma

Summary
AI Engineer building production-grade systems combining LLMs, machine learning, and backend infrastructure.
Experience in deploying multimodal ML pipelines, integrating LLM APIs (OpenAI, Groq) with RAG-based per-
sonalization, and building scalable real-time applications. Strong focus on shipping real-world AI products with
measurable impact.

Skills
Languages: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, Java, Go AI/ML: PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn,
OpenCV, CNNs, Random Forest, YOLO LLM Systems: OpenAI API, Groq API, Prompt Engineering, RAG
(vector retrieval), structured outputs Web/Backend: React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, REST, GraphQL, Web-
Sockets Cloud DB: Firebase, MongoDB Atlas, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Prisma ORM Tools: Docker, Git

Experience
Software Development Engineer (Full-time)                                 Mar 2025 – Oct 2025 Ninexfold, Indore
   • Built cloud-based POS systems for retail and hospitality: billing, inventory, tax rules, and receipt workflows.
   • Developed Hotel PMS modules including reservations, pricing/rate plans, housekeeping, and analytics dash-
     boards.
   • Implemented Petro POS integrating fuel pump controllers and shift reconciliation systems.
   • Built WebSocket-based dialer (JustCall-style) with real-time call tracking, logs, and agent analytics.
   • Designed scalable system architectures, REST APIs, authentication flows, and deployment pipelines.
   AI/ML Intern                                 Jan 2025 – Apr 2025 Corescent Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (Remote)
   • Built and deployed ML models with real-time inference pipelines integrated into backend systems.
   • Worked on AI-driven workflows including data pipelines, API integration, and performance optimization.
   Software Development Intern                               Nov 2024 – Jan 2025 Coreintels Pvt Ltd, Bengaluru
   • Developed microservices and improved API performance for real-time cloud-based applications.
   • Worked on backend systems enabling real-time synchronization and scalable request handling.

Projects
Multimodal Behavioral Analytics + LLM Personalization
   • Built system analyzing keystroke dynamics (timing patterns) using Random Forest trained on real-world
     data.
   • Generated behavioral stress/cognitive scores using ML models.
   • Integrated Groq LLM for personalized recommendations via prompt engineering.
   • Designed RAG-based memory system storing user sessions for contextual, adaptive responses.
   Alzheimer’s Early Detection (Hackathon)
   • Built multimodal pipeline combining emotion detection, keystroke patterns, and ML models.
   • Aggregated outputs from multiple models and used LLM for interpretation and reporting.
   • Designed system for continuous monitoring sessions with personalized insights.
   Virtual Try-On (CATVTON) Production Pipeline
   • Fine-tuned and deployed CATVTON pipeline on RTX 4090 GPU.
   • Achieved production-level inference under 10 seconds per request.
   • Optimized pipeline for scalability and real-time usage.
   LLM Budget Planner (OpenAI Integration)
   • Built AI-powered feature for a marriage planning application using OpenAI API.
   • Generated personalized budget recommendations and planning insights using structured prompts.

                                                         1
 Additional Work
   • Developed and deployed multiple live web and mobile applications (Play Store, App Store, production web-
     sites).
   • Built real-world backend systems handling user traffic, authentication, and scalable APIs.

Education
B.Tech, Computer Science Shri Vaishnav Institute of Technology and Science, Indore CGPA: 7.6 / 10

Achievements
   • Runner-up, National Hackathon

                                                     2
